Hermès Picotin Lock 18 Gold Epsom Leather with Braided Handle & Silver Hardware

Product Details:
Brand: Hermès
Model: Picotin Lock 18
Material: Epsom Leather (Highly structured and holds its shape perfectly)
Color: Gold (Classic Hermès Gold-Brown)
Hardware: Silver-tone (Palladium Hardware)
Blind Stamp: Y (2020)
Special Feature: Limited Edition Braided Handle

Condition Report:
Condition: 99% New / Excellent, like-new condition.
This bag is incredibly sturdy and maintains its perfect shape even when empty, true to the durable nature of Epsom leather. The protective plastic films are still intact on the bottom hardware studs.

Seller's Note:
A true collector's piece! This limited edition features a beautifully crafted braided handle, adding a unique and harmonious highlight to the classic Picotin silhouette. It is much rarer and originally more expensive than the standard version, ensuring you won't easily bump into someone with the exact same bag. Offered at a great price, do not miss out on this gem!
